title: INF-9 Subquadratic UI (model loading + state-vector controls + variant badge) [MULTI-QUARTER]
goal: Subquadratic UI in Inference Lab: model loader scoped to SSM/RWKV variants, state-vector controls (commit/restore/persist/rehydrate), variant badge (Mamba2 / RWKV v5 / v6 / v7). Hidden via capabilities.supportsSubquadratic == false.
implementation_notes: Per AC-INFER-LAB-UI-TOGGLES + AC-INFER-LAB-UI-AB-COMPARE. SubquadraticPanel.svelte: variant badge (Mamba2/RWKVv5/v6/v7) prominent; state-vector controls section (commit current state, list of saved states with name + timestamp + bytes, restore selected, persist to disk, rehydrate from disk); subquadratic-specific config (e.g., n_layer, d_state read-only display from model config). Hidden via capability gate. MULTI-QUARTER UI work — placeholder copy on the page indicates the surface may change as the feature parity work progresses; operator can opt out of subquadratic UI via a Work Profile flag (settings.ui.show_subquadratic_panel) if they're not yet using SSMs.
risk_if_missed: Operator cannot interact with SSM state vectors through UI.
validator_focus: Hidden when unsupported; variant badge prominent; opt-out Work Profile flag honoured.

minimum_controls: Variant badge correct for loaded model.
